description: A simple, well-defined spec for testing develop_tool end-to-end

spec.name: word_frequency_counter
spec.one_liner: Count word occurrences in a text file and return the top-N most common words
spec.rationale: A focused, low-risk spec good for exercising code generation and the safety gate.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the text file

top_n.description: Number of most-common words to return

spec.output_description: A dict with 'words' (list of {word, count} objects) and 'total_words' (int).
spec.implementation_approach: Read the file, lowercase and split on non-word characters using re.split, count with collections.Counter, return the top_n most common as a list of dicts.
